# Slack Web API coverage

All 205 non-admin methods, in [reference](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/) order.

**slack-mcp-server** is our tool name (names mirror the method, snake_cased; `-` = not yet implemented). **user token scopes** are the OAuth scopes a user token (`xoxp`) needs, per the linked [method](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/) and [scope](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/scopes/) pages (`-` = none listed; the method is bot/app-only or needs no scope). **tier** is Slack's documented [rate-limit tier](https://docs.slack.dev/apis/web-api/rate-limits) for the method.

| slack api | slack-mcp-server | user token scopes | tier |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`api.test`](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/api.test) | `-` | `-` | `Tier 4` |
| [`apps.activities.list`](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/apps.activities.list) | `-` | [`hosting:read`](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/scopes/hosting.read) | `Tier 3` |
| [`apps.auth.external.delete`](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/apps.auth.external.delete) | `-` | `-` | `Tier 4` |
| [`apps.auth.external.get`](https://docs.slack.dev/reference/methods/apps.auth.external.get) | `-` | `-` | `Tier 3` |
